latestEntry.notes: Week 6 Day 1 of Talk 4 (Week 2 of 2). Overview focus: Building on Week 1's 5 notions to explore practical application frameworks. Introduction to Week 2 focus on specific tools: decision trees, probability, and checklists. 5 case snapshots - New Coke fiasco, social media engagement engines, job offer trap, Berkshire Coca-Cola investment, Theranos failure. Core model: Lollapalooza Effect as combinatorial thinking tool. Commitment: Run upcoming decision through 5-Notions Checklist. Message delivered successfully.
